emptySearch.advancedGuide: For advanced usecases see official documentation
emptySearch.description: Just type your query in search input above and hit Enter

tips.title: Try these tips to refine your search
tips.prefix: search for all strings starting with "Jo"
tips.fuzzy: fuzzy search for word "John" in all files with maximum of 2 replacements
tips.exact: search for the exact term "John Smith"
tips.exactDistance: search for both "John" and "Smith" with maximum distance of 10 words
tips.size: search for all files larger than 1 Megabyte (options: "M" for Megabytes, "K" for Kilobytes)
tips.when: search for all files modified today (options: today, yesterday, thisweek, thismonth, thisyear)
tips.author: list all authors
tips.tagsNegate: search for files NOT tagged with "interesting"
tips.and: search for all files tagged with "interesting" and have a timestamp from today
tips.or: search for all files tagged with "interesting" or have a timestamp from today
tips.allHidden: search for both hidden and not hidden files
tips.uploadTime: search for all files uploaded on or before 2020-06-15
tips.creationTime: search for all files created after 2020 but before 2025
tips.modificationTime: search for all files modified after 2020 but before 2025
tips.secrets: search for all files containing secrets
tips.summary: filter to files that have an AI-generated summary
tips.allFields: search in all fields for "John" (including metadata fields)
tips.nameFields: search for the substring "txt" in all fields containing the string "name"

sort.title: Or sort your files
sort.name: sort all files by name in A-Z order
sort.uploaded: sort to show most recently uploaded files first

hotkeys.title: Keyboard shortcuts for faster navigation
hotkeys.shiftClickNegate: Shift + click any filter (path, extension, tag, icon) to negate it (adds NOT)

statisticsView.staleHint: Data may have changed since last refresh.

archives.title: Archives
archives.encryptionKeyInfoDescription: This is the master key used to encrypt all .loom archive files created by this Loom instance.
archives.encryptionKeyInfoSyncNote: To seamlessly import archives between two Loom instances, both must share the same master key. Set the ARCHIVE_ENC_MASTER_KEY environment variable to this value on the other instance.
